Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

zeitR 0.1.0 (2026-06)

  • Full package scaffold with complete actigraphy pipeline: read_acttrust(), read_actigraphy(), read_actigraphy_dir(), prepare_actigraphy(), check_consistency(), detect_offwrist_bimodal() (full Condor three-stage refiner), detect_sleep_crespo(), detect_naps_crespo(), score_epochs_cole_kripke(), compute_waso(), compute_npcra(), study_summary(), run_pipeline(), run_pipeline_batch().
  • Three vignettes: getting started, NPCRA, study-level analysis.
  • pkgdown site with Bootstrap 5 and Circadia Lab branding.

zeitR — Circadia Lab, Northumbria University. Lucas França & Mario Leocadio-Miguel.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
